CVE-2021-23362.title: The package hosted-git-info before 3.0.8 are vulnerable to Regula ...
CVE-2021-23362.description: The package hosted-git-info before 3.0.8 are vulnerable to Regular Expression Denial of Service (ReDoS) via regular expression shortcutMatch in the fromUrl function in index.js. The affected regular expression exhibits polynomial worst-case time complexity.
